action.reasoning: Observation: ResNet50 only reached 0.397 val bal_acc - useless. Current predict.py includes it at weight 0.05, which will hurt the ensemble. Best test score is 0.8539 with 3-model ensemble. Analysis: Remove ResNet from ensemble, re-optimize weights on val set, and submit. With ~40min remaining, no time to train new models. Decision: Fix predict.py, optimize weights on val, submit eval immediately.
